ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution (city, state) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., University, College, Institute) */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director or head of the institution */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution (e.g., NAAC, UGC) */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available in the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., North, East, South, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "quota_name" TEXT /* Name of the quota (e.g., All Indian Quota, Home State Quota) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quota */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total seats allocated to the quota */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed eligibility criteria for the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_quotas" (
  "institution_quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution-quota record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "seat_count" INTEGER /* Number of seats allocated under the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_quotas_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_quotas_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution to which the application is submitted */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota under which the application is submitted */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_fee" TEXT /* Fee paid for the application */,
  "application_form_number" TEXT /* Unique number for the application form */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the required documents (e.g., pending, submitted, verified) */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed, not required) */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Final status of the application (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_decisions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., B.Tech, M.A, Ph.D) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_courses" (
  "institution_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution-course record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "intake" INTEGER /* Number of seats available for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_courses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, institution representative, applicant) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., seat utilization, application trends) */,
  "report_generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
